use_cases: Display status labels on dashboard cards and data tables
Show product categories, tags, or classification markers in e-commerce
Indicate subscription tiers like trial, pro, or premium badges
Highlight feature availability or limits in settings pages
Mark content types or metadata in media and content platforms
ai_summary: A versatile badge component with 16 color variants including solid, subtle, and gradient options. Supports three sizes (sm, md, lg) with optional icon integration and optional Link wrapping for navigation. Built with Tailwind CSS for consistent theming across SaaS, e-commerce, and dashboard interfaces.
